name: Garbanzo Gravy
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons steak sauce or vegetarian Worcestershire sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine all ingredients except broth and steak sauce.
2. Toast over medium heat, stirring, about 2 minutes.
3. Gradually whisk in the broth and steak sauce into the flour mixture.
4. Cook, stirring until smooth and thickened. Serve immediately.
